ground_truth.title: Web3 M&A Marketplace | Acquire.Fi
ground_truth.main_content: The #1 Marketplace for buying and selling Web3 businesses and assets. Crypto, blockchain, NFT and Web3 M&A deal flow. Unlock alpha today. Browse listings of Web3 businesses and projects for sale including DeFi protocols, blockchain infrastructure, crypto casinos, trading platforms, market making services, payment solutions, and more. Filter by revenue status (Growing Business, Profitable Business, Pre-Revenue) and sector (Infrastructure, Blockchain, CeFi, DeFi, DAO, Gaming, AI, Mining, Social/Media, NFTs, Metaverse, Service, Data, Tooling, SAAS, Trading, Payments). Access unlisted deals, custom industry searches, and direct access with the Acquire.Fi team. Register as a premium buyer for additional access.
